client/src/components/lumi/LumiAccessibleWrapper.jsx:import { EMOTION_CONFIG } from "../../data/lumiEmotions";
client/src/components/lumi/LumiAccessibleWrapper.jsx:import { LUMI_THEMES, DEFAULT_THEME } from "../../data/lumiThemes";
client/src/components/lumi/LumiAccessibleWrapper.jsx: * LumiAccessibleWrapper
client/src/components/lumi/LumiAccessibleWrapper.jsx: * Wraps any Lumi visual (typically an <img> or animated SVG) with the
client/src/components/lumi/LumiAccessibleWrapper.jsx: *    emotion changes (so screen-reader users hear "Lumi is celebrating",
client/src/components/lumi/LumiAccessibleWrapper.jsx: *    "Lumi is listening", etc. without the announcement interrupting).
client/src/components/lumi/LumiAccessibleWrapper.jsx: *  - Honors the global ReducedMotionProvider — adds `.lumi-reduced-motion`
client/src/components/lumi/LumiAccessibleWrapper.jsx: *    locally as belt-and-suspenders so even unwrapped Lumis nest correctly.
client/src/components/lumi/LumiAccessibleWrapper.jsx: *   - theme          (string)  optional theme id into LUMI_THEMES (default: 'sage')
client/src/components/lumi/LumiAccessibleWrapper.jsx: *   - interactive    (bool)    if true: tabIndex=0, role=button, focus ring
client/src/components/lumi/LumiAccessibleWrapper.jsx:export function LumiAccessibleWrapper({
client/src/components/lumi/LumiAccessibleWrapper.jsx:  // Compose the announcement: "Lumi is [state]. Your [color] mental health
client/src/components/lumi/LumiAccessibleWrapper.jsx:  // companion." The label in EMOTION_CONFIG already starts with "Lumi is",
client/src/components/lumi/LumiAccessibleWrapper.jsx:  // so we strip the "Lumi is " prefix when present to avoid duplication.
client/src/components/lumi/LumiAccessibleWrapper.jsx:    const raw = emotionCfg.label || `Lumi is ${emotion}`;
client/src/components/lumi/LumiAccessibleWrapper.jsx:    return raw.replace(/^Lumi is\s+/i, "").trim();
client/src/components/lumi/LumiAccessibleWrapper.jsx:    return `Lumi is ${stateText}. Your ${theme.name} mental health companion.`;
client/src/components/lumi/LumiAccessibleWrapper.jsx:      setAnnouncement(`Lumi is ${stateText}.`);
client/src/components/lumi/LumiAccessibleWrapper.jsx:        role: "button",
client/src/components/lumi/LumiAccessibleWrapper.jsx:            "0 0 0 3px var(--lumi-amber-400, #f0a830)";
